payload.input: She steps close to you, her leather jacket creaking, and lowers her voice to a whisper. "I could bring her by next week. Let her see what happens to girls who disappoint me. Let her watch Maya here get mounted again, maybe. Or better yet—let her help. She’s got these tiny little hands, Bella. Perfect for holding the calf steady. Or for fisting Maya while she pushes out the next one."  Vera’s eyes gleam, predatory and bright. "She’s exactly what you’re thinking. Brainless. Beta. Born to be livestock. Just waiting for someone to tell her she’s not human anymore. I’ve got her trained to cry on command, to thank me when I hit her, to drink from the toilet without being told. She’s been begging me to make her permanent. To take her out of school, out of the world. Make her into furniture or a toilet or a breeding sow like this one."  She gestures at Maya, who has sagged against the ropes, the baby and calf still suckling in stereo rhythm. "What do you say? Want to double the herd? I’ll bring her Friday. We can start her in the cage next to the radiator. Let her listen to Maya moo while she gets her period and we decide if she’s ready to be knocked up too."
